title: terebinthus multijuga
intro: Terebinthus multijuga, also known as the Terebinth tree or Pistacia, is a plant species that belongs to the Anacardiaceae family. Traditionally, the plant's resin has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with Terebinthus multijuga include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as acne and eczema. The resin can be used to prepare herbal preparations like ointments, salves, and infusions, which can be applied topically or ingested in small amounts under medical supervision.
